title: Throwable Fire Charges
description: Ever wanted to be able to shoot small fire balls like blazes?
body:
# Description
Ever wanted to be able to shoot small fire balls like blazes?

Well, Throwbable Fire Charges is a light weight datapack that allows you to throw fire charges by simply right clicking on it!

## Disclamer
The code to make the fireball have motion is actually not my work, but was made by [Error 422](https://youtu.be/iJr9Msoh6xs?si=CVVRl43bSCiWpjr8) where he showed how to make an entity get a motion from your direction, all credits on the motion/movement of the fire charge goes to him and i only made the detecting part.


### Comments:
Well? Did you like it?, Consider checking my other Projects!
- [Way too many Datapacks!](https://modrinth.com/collection/aqrbm311)
